scripts.dev:raw: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix backend && npm run lint --prefix frontend
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix --prefix backend && npm run lint:fix --prefix frontend
scripts.lint:strict: npm run lint:strict --prefix backend && npm run lint:strict --prefix frontend
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run start --prefix frontend"
